creator: watanabe@zlab.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
I have updated the 'ja-mendexk-*' ports. (2.4c -> 2.4d)
I put the patches for 'japanese/mendexk-euc' and 'japanese/mendexk-sjis'
below "Fix:".

Changed files are

  mendex-euc/Makefile
  mendex-euc/files/md5

  mendex-sjis/Makefile
  mendex-sjis/files/md5

- Makoto WATANABE
watanabe@zlab.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
